data.title: Information on the voting rights attached to the shares issued by AB Akola Group
data.description: In the recent share repurchase initiative by AB Akola Group, the company bought back 500,000 shares from its shareholders for a sum of EUR 875,000. The buy-back transaction was completed on March 24, 2026.

data.title: SHEIN Expands Sustainable Aviation Fuel Pilot Initiatives, Signs Agreement with DHL for GoGreen Plus Service
data.description: In March 25, 2026, SHEIN, an international e-commerce platform for fashion and lifestyle products, announced a partnership with DHL to implement DHL's GoGreen Plus program. This initiative aims to promote the incorporation of sustainable aviation fuel (SAF) in air freight operations. The collaboration reflects SHEIN's commitment to environmental sustainability and supports efforts to reduce carbon emissions in logistics.

data.title: Industry Innovators Celebrated for Integral Services-Led Broadband Contributions
data.description: In Fremont, California, several broadband innovators were honored at Broadband Forum’s awards ceremony in Melbourne, Australia. Individuals from various companies including Calix, Candela Technologies, China Mobile, Deutsche Telekom, Futurewei Technologies, HPE, Huawei Technologies, InCoax Networks, Infosys, Nokia, Orange, Radisys, and ZTE were recognized for their contributions to advancing services-led broadband. The event showcased pioneers who have played a crucial role in driving broadband technology forward. The awards ceremony celebrated the efforts of these individuals from leading companies in the industry.

data.title: Fivetran Contributes SQLMesh to the Linux Foundation to Advance Open Data Infrastructure
data.description: Fivetran, a prominent player in data movement, made headlines by revealing its decision to contribute SQLMesh, an open source data transformation framework, to the Linux Foundation. The move was aimed at promoting a community-driven model for the development and upkeep of SQLMesh within the contemporary data stack. Noteworthy members such as Benzinga, CloudKitchens, Harness, Infinite Lambda, Jump AI, and Minerva have already shown their support for this initiative. Anjan Kunda emphasized the effectiveness of open core components in data infrastructure.

data.title: Changes in management boards of group subsidiaries
data.description: Effective March 25, 2026, Priit Luman is no longer part of the management boards of Eurocon OÜ and Swencn AB, both subsidiaries of Nordecon AS. In their place, Richard Reiles now serves as the management board member of Eurocon OÜ, while Helin Kikerpill has taken on the same role at Swencn AB.
